stage_gates.title: Start Your Social Presence
stage_gates.prompt: Set up your Instagram bio and add a link in bio. Your social presence is your business card — make it count.
stage_gates.tip: Even 100 engaged followers is enough to land your first brand deal. Quality beats quantity at this stage.

stage_gates.title: Make Your First Move
stage_gates.prompt: Send your first brand collab DM. Reaching out to brands is a skill — the more you do it, the easier it gets. Use the template we've prepared for you.
stage_gates.tip: Don't wait until you have a huge following. Micro-influencers (1k–10k) often get better response rates than big accounts.

stage_gates.title: Go Pro — Send Your Media Kit
stage_gates.prompt: Send your media kit to 2 brands this week. Your CreatorLevel profile is your media kit. Brands want to see your numbers, your audience, and your story.
stage_gates.tip: The best media kit pitches lead with your audience's story, not your own numbers. Tell brands who they're really reaching.

stage_gates.title: Get on the Radar — Pitch Press & Podcasts
stage_gates.prompt: Pitch yourself to a podcast or media outlet. At this stage, earned media and press features are what separate brands from creators. Your story is worth telling.
stage_gates.tip: Podcasts with 1k–10k listeners in your niche will often say yes to a strong pitch. Bigger isn't always better.
